response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong full-stack engineering credentials with 20 years of experience and solid infrastructure knowledge, this resume has critical issues: the header name (Maria Rodriguez) doesn't match any contact information (all point to Bogdan Szabo), raising authenticity concerns. More importantly, the role requires director-level strategic leadership in AI—evidenced by demonstrated AI products, deep AI expertise, and customer advisory experience. This resume shows recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq but lacks the portfolio of AI-driven products, strategic vision, or customer engagement expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy.
strengths: 20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure—genuine full-stack depth
Proven ability to build and scale: founded GISCollective (10 years, open-source, used by Green Map globally), contributed to high-impact products (WatchUp Apple TV top 10 US)
Strong teaching and mentorship track record: workshops on web internals, TDD, Selenium; organized refactoring dojos; created multiple open-source libraries
concerns: Critical identity mismatch: resume header lists 'Maria Rodriguez' but all contact details (email, GitHub, LinkedIn, phone) belong to 'Bogdan Szabo'—requires immediate clarification
No demonstrated AI strategic expertise: recent role mentions AI infrastructure but lacks portfolio of AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership required for AI strategy position

Experience gap for director-level strategic role: resume shows strong individual engineering craft and some mentoring, but no evidence of identifying market opportunities, advising enterprises on emerging technologies, or driving product-level strategic decisions
